nasb.text: Then Pharaoh took off his signet ring from his hand and put it on Joseph’s hand, and clothed him in garments of fine linen and put the gold necklace around his neck.

esv.text: Then Pharaoh took his signet ring from his hand and put it on Joseph’s hand, and clothed him in garments of fine linen and put a gold chain about his neck.

cnv.text: 於是，法老脫下他手上打印的戒指，戴在約瑟的手上；給他穿上細麻的衣服，把金頸鍊掛在他的頸項上；

ccb.text: 于是，法老摘下手上用来盖印的戒指，戴在约瑟的手上，给他穿上细麻袍，把金链戴在他颈上，

csbs.text: 然后法老从自己手上取下印戒，戴在约瑟手上，给他穿上细麻衣，把金链戴在他的脖子上；
